title: rubus koehleri var. praeruptorum
intro: Rubus koehleri var. praeruptorum, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or Indian Strawberry, is a variant of the Rubus koehleri plant species. This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus koehleri var. praeruptorum include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as dried and used in capsules or as a powder for various health remedies.
